ValidationRule.description: Prevents an Opportunity from being saved as Closed Won if any of the required project fields are blank.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"), OR( ISBLANK(Estimated_Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(Estimated_End_Date__c), ISBLANK(Service_Line__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Project_Classification__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Project_Sub_classification__c)), ISBLANK(Amount), ISBLANK(Estimated_Construction_Costs__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Before marking this Opportunity as Closed Won, please complete all required project fields: Project Lead, Estimated Start Date, Estimated End Date, Service Line, Project Classification, Project Sub-Classification, Amount, and Estimated Construction Costs.
